The secret behind that gold glow?
It starts underneath.

Kymee jewellery is made with 925 sterling silver, finished in 18K gold vermeil — giving you a premium feel without premium pricing.

✔ Skin-friendly
✔ Long-lasting
✔ Thoughtfully crafted

Gold, made practical.

#goldvermeil #925sterlingsilver #skinfriendly #hypoallergenic #antitarnish

POV: your jewellery matched the vibe perfectly

#kymee #goldvermeiljewellery #dailywear #summerstyle #diamondjewelry

Not all gold-looking jewellery is the same.

Kymee’s gold vermeil is crafted with real 925 sterling silver, layered with 18K gold for a finish that looks richer and wears better.

✔ No stainless steel
✔ No shortcuts
✔ Just honest materials

Premium, redefined.
Made for everyday elegance.

#goldvermeil #925sterlingsilver #skinfriendly #hypoallergenic #antitarnish

body.text: {{product.brand}}

Gold vermeil = quality you can trust.

At Kymee, we use real 925 sterling silver as the foundation and coat it with a thick 18K gold layer — ensuring durability, comfort, and a true gold finish.

✔ Hypoallergenic
✔ Anti-tarnish
✔ Designed for everyday wear

Because good jewellery should last beyond trends.

#goldvermeil #925sterlingsilver #skinfriendly #hypoallergenic #antitarnish
